g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the first ConvBlock learn in the encoder?')
sendPrompt('Why does the encoder use MaxPool?')
sendPrompt('What does the second encoder ConvBlock learn?')
sendPrompt('What does the second MaxPool do to the spectrogram?')
sendPrompt('What does the bottleneck represent in the U-Net?')
sendPrompt('How does ConvTranspose2d upsample the feature map?')
sendPrompt('How does the skip connection get used in decoder ConvBlock dec2?')
sendPrompt('What does the second ConvTranspose do?')
sendPrompt('What does the final decoder ConvBlock produce?')
